basic_details.job_title: Raipur Development Block Bankura Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Raipur Development Block Bankura has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Technical Assistant (TA) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 19-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline, Diploma / BCA / MCA with Sound Knowledge of Computer and MS Office, Typing Speed of 30 wpm, Minimum 1 year experience in Government or Non-Government Organization, Ability to run App in Android / IOS, GIS background preferred, Citizen of India
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline, Diploma / BCA / MCA having Sound Knowledge of Computer and ability to work in MS Office Packages (MS Word, MS Excel, MS Power Point). Must have Typing Speed of 30 wpm in Keyboard. Minimum 1 year of working experience in any Government or Non-Government Organization. Having the ability to run an App in Android / IOS. GIS background should be given preference. Must be a Citizen of India.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Raipur Development Block Bankura Technical Assistant (TA) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Raipur Development Block Bankura Technical Assistant (TA) Job 2026 Noti

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Technical Assistant (TA) post is 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates should be graduates in any discipline, or possess a Diploma, BCA, or MCA with sound knowledge of computers and MS Office. A typing speed of 30 wpm is also required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Technical Assistant (TA) post is between 21 years and 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical Assistant (TA) post includes an Interview and a Typing Test.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any preference given to candidates with a GIS background?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a GIS background will be given preference for the Technical Assistant (TA) position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Technical Assistant (TA) post.

faq.question: Q10. What is the required experience for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 1 year of working experience in any Government or Non-Government Organization is required for the Technical Assistant (TA) position.
